sources.coverage: Current active conversation and its mounted uploads are visible in this runtime.
sources.proof_limit: Does not enumerate sibling project chats.

sources.coverage: Only project-chat context explicitly exposed to this runtime can be used.
sources.proof_limit: The project UI's complete chat list and hidden sibling-chat bodies are not directly enumerable.
The 602 Jarvis-core count is an overlapping bounded inference, not canonical membership in the current live project.

sources.coverage: Chats or edits after 2026-06-25 are not guaranteed to exist in the historical export.
sources.exact_next_action: Ingest a fresh ChatGPT export or explicit project chat/source packs, then delta-map by conversation and message ID.

sources.coverage: No connector in this runtime exposes a complete authoritative project-chat list and bodies.
sources.exact_next_action: Use a fresh export, move/copy chats into accessible source packs, or connect an authorised project-chat export mechanism.

continuous_reconciliation_contract: Inventory every newly visible chat or export.
Preserve user and assistant messages separately with exact pointers and hashes.
Delta-map new requirements, conflicts, decisions and OpenLoops into canonical registries.
Never claim all project chats are current unless the live denominator and post-export delta both reconcile.
current_conclusion: Historical and supplied project evidence can be continuously consolidated, but full live-project chat visibility is not proven.
